SEARCH
Package algorithms.mazeGenerators

Class Maze

java.lang.Object
algorithms.mazeGenerators.Maze
public class Maze extends Object
Represents a 2D maze with walls, paths, start position, and goal position. The maze consists of a 2D array where 0 represents traversable paths and 1 represents walls.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Maze(int rows, int cols)
    Creates a maze with the specified dimensions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    int
    getCell(int row, int col)
    Gets the value of a specific cell in the maze.
    int
    getCols()
    Gets the number of columns in the maze.
    Position
    getGoalPosition()
    Gets the goal position of the maze.
    int[][]
    getMaze()
    Gets the 2D array representing the maze.
    Position
    getPosition()
    Generates a random position on the border of the maze that is traversable (value 0).
    int
    getRows()
    Gets the number of rows in the maze.
    Position
    getStartPosition()
    Gets the start position of the maze.
    void
    print()
    Prints the maze to the console.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • Maze

      public Maze(int rows, int cols)
      Creates a maze with the specified dimensions.
      Parameters:
      rows - The number of rows in the maze
      cols - The number of columns in the maze

  • Method Details

    • getMaze

      public int[][] getMaze()
      Gets the 2D array representing the maze.
      Returns:
      The 2D maze array

    • getCell

      public int getCell(int row, int col)
      Gets the value of a specific cell in the maze.
      Parameters:
      row - The row index
      col - The column index
      Returns:
      The cell value (0 for path, 1 for wall)

    • getRows

      public int getRows()
      Gets the number of rows in the maze.
      Returns:
      The number of rows

    • getCols

      public int getCols()
      Gets the number of columns in the maze.
      Returns:
      The number of columns

    • print

      public void print()
      Prints the maze to the console. Uses 'S' to mark the start position and 'E' to mark the end position.

    • getStartPosition

      public Position getStartPosition()
      Gets the start position of the maze. Initializes the start position if not already set.
      Returns:
      A copy of the start position

    • getGoalPosition

      public Position getGoalPosition()
      Gets the goal position of the maze. Initializes the goal position if not already set.
      Returns:
      A copy of the goal position

    • getPosition

      public Position getPosition()
      Generates a random position on the border of the maze that is traversable (value 0).
      Returns:
      A randomly generated position
